'''Zyne Kinahay''' was the son of [[Eben Kinahay]], an antiques dealer. Zyne was a tall lanky man with a muscular frame. He was known as a criminal in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], but he was also a devotee of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]].

==Biography==
Eben wished for his son to follow in his footsteps, but Zyne wanted no part of his father's work and decided to travel [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in search of more information on the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].

During the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], he went to [[Centerpoint Station]] to retrieve his father's [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]], but failed due to Eben's security measures.
